title: 3套JK制服搭配🔥附价格参考！甜酷风一网打尽
body_text:
姐妹们！是不是还在纠结JK制服怎么搭才不显土？我花了一周时间整理了3套日常又出圈的搭配，从水手服到西式都覆盖啦～

✅第一套：经典水手服+纯色百褶裙
上衣选择绀色关东襟水手服（约120元），搭配灰色百褶裙（约80元），领结用同色系（15元）。整体清爽乖巧，适合上学或日常出街，配上小白鞋活力满满！

✅第二套：西式制服+格裙+开衫
白色短袖衬衫（约90元）打底，外穿卡其色毛衣开衫（约150元），下身搭配红蓝格纹百褶裙（约100元）。这套温柔又有层次感，秋冬叠穿大衣也好看，配乐福鞋或马丁靴都🉑！

✅第三套：纯色卫衣+格裙+堆堆袜
宽松灰色连帽卫衣（约110元）搭配深蓝格裙（约90元），露出白色堆堆袜（约20元）和帆布鞋。街头休闲风，拍照超上镜，而且完全不挑身材！

💡小tips：领结/领带买绀色或红色最百搭；袜子选白色或黑色中筒袜；发饰可以用蝴蝶结发夹增加细节～

快艾特你的笨蛋闺蜜一起穿JK出街吧！组队拍照直接封神！

pages.title: 三套总览
pages.hook: JK穿搭合集，甜酷日常任你选！
pages.story: 三套JK搭配覆盖水手服、西式和休闲风，每套都标注了单品价格和风格标签，学生党也能轻松入手。
pages.layout_hint: 三套JK穿搭拼图，每套一个小格子，标注风格标签和总价，背景校园绿茵场

pages.title: 水手服搭配
pages.hook: 经典绀色水手服，乖巧学院风！
pages.story: 绀色关东襟水手服搭配灰色百褶裙，领结点缀细节。上衣版型挺括，不显肩宽；裙摆褶皱立体，A字版型显腿长。配白色中筒袜和黑色玛丽珍鞋，清新又减龄。
pages.layout_hint: 全身穿搭照，左侧标注单品价格，右侧特写领结和裙褶，文字标注关键卖点

pages.title: 西式制服搭
pages.hook: 温柔开衫+格裙，叠穿超好看！
pages.story: 白色衬衫打底，卡其色开衫增加层次感，红蓝格纹裙点亮全身。开衫面料柔软不扎人，格裙颜色正、不易皱。配棕色乐福鞋和同色系斜挎包，日系氛围感拉满。
pages.layout_hint: 模特侧身站立，展示开衫和格裙的叠穿效果，右侧用箭头标注层次，背景图书馆书架

pages.title: 卫衣休闲搭
pages.hook: 没想到JK还能这么穿！运动休闲风。
pages.story: 灰色连帽卫衣搭配深蓝格裙，白色堆堆袜露出脚踝。卫衣Oversize版型遮肉显瘦，格裙百褶不炸褶。配白色帆布鞋和双肩包，逛街上课都舒服，拍照姿势随便摆。
pages.layout_hint: 摆拍姿势：模特坐在地上，双腿前伸，展现卫衣和格裙的搭配，地面点缀落叶，文字标注价格

pages.title: 配饰点睛
pages.hook: 小配饰让JK制服更出彩！
pages.story: 推荐几个百搭配饰：绀色或红色领结/领带（约20元）、白色中筒袜（15元）、黑色玛丽珍鞋（180元）、蝴蝶结发夹（10元）。这些单品能瞬间提升精致度，且不挑套装。
pages.layout_hint: 俯拍桌面，摆放领结、袜子、发夹和鞋子，用白色手绘圆圈标注重点，背景为木质桌面

pages.title: 场景穿搭
pages.hook: 不同场合该穿哪套？这里帮你选！
pages.story: 上学首选水手服，乖巧不张扬；约会/拍照穿西式开衫格裙，温柔显气质；运动/逛街选卫衣格裙，自在又时尚。每套搭配都在日常可穿范围内，不会太夸张。
pages.layout_hint: 左中右三列拼图，每列对应一个场景，人物剪影+文字说明，背景为街景/教室/公园模糊图

pages.title: 搭配技巧
pages.hook: 100元也能穿出高级感？学会这3点！
pages.story: 1.领结颜色和裙色呼应（如红蓝格裙配红色领结）。2.袜子长度选膝盖下10厘米最显腿长。3.上衣塞进裙子时留一点松量，避免紧绷。还可以用腰带/腰包提高腰线。
pages.layout_hint: 手绘标注线图片，在模特腿部位置画出袜长参考线，衣角处标注松量，背景为纯色清爽色调

pages.title: 总结推荐
pages.hook: 把这篇码住，就足够搞定JK穿搭！
pages.story: 三套加起来总花费约615元（不含鞋），每套都能单穿或混搭。水手服最经典，西式最温柔，卫衣最日常，新手闭眼入不踩雷！还想看更多搭配吗？评论区告诉我你最想配什么上衣！
pages.layout_hint: 总结卡片式：中间放三套JK拼图，下方主题文字+价格总数，底部互动引导“戳我留言”按钮

Middle 60%: three dynamic full-body silhouettes of sailor, western cardigan, and hoodie JK styles overlapping, shot from low angle with motion blur and sun flares, models with different hairstyles. Bottom 20%: Chinese text '总价约615元起' in a soft gradient circle with small tag '学生党必备'. Background: school lawn with bright green and clear sky, warm natural light, 5% margin. No dark colors.

image_prompts.prompt: Xiaohongshu poster, vertical 3:4, info-graphic style. Include Chinese text labels, price tags, and titles visible on the image. Showing: 三套总览. Clean layout, professional, readable Chinese text.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Left 55%: full-body front view of a model with shoulder-length hair and round face, wearing navy sailor uniform and gray pleated skirt, standing with hands at sides, soft lighting. Right 45%: two inset circular close-ups of bow tie and skirt pleats. Chinese text on left: '上衣约120元 裙子约80元' in thin font. Right insets have '领结约15元' and '褶皱立体' arrows. Background: pale blue gradient, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Model (long face, high ponytail) standing in three-quarter view, wearing white shirt, beige cardigan, red-blue plaid skirt. Right side: diagonal arrow lines pointing to layers with Chinese labels '内搭衬衫约90', '开衫约150', '格裙约100'. Background: blurred library bookshelves in warm brown wood tone, soft natural light, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Model (square face, double bun) sitting on ground, legs extended forward, wearing gray hoodie and dark blue plaid skirt, white stack socks visible. Ground with scattered autumn leaves. In front, three Chinese price tags: '卫衣约110', '格裙约90', '堆堆袜约20'. Background: blurred park path in soft gray, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Top-down view on light wood table. Items arranged in circle: navy bow tie, white knee socks, hair clip with bow, black Mary Janes. White hand-drawn circles highlight each item with Chinese price labels: '领结约20', '中筒袜约15', '发夹约10', '玛丽珍鞋约180'. Soft natural light, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Three vertical columns: left column with blue tint shows sailor girl silhouette and Chinese text '上学：水手服+黑皮鞋', middle column pink tint shows cardigan silhouette and '约会：开衫+格裙+乐福鞋', right column green tint shows hoodie silhouette and '逛街：卫衣+格裙+帆布鞋'. Each column has blurred scene background (classroom, park, street). 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Close-up on legs and waist of model (short hair, round face). On right leg, dashed line and arrow with Chinese '袜长：膝下10厘米'. On waist, arrow at tucked shirt with '塞衣角留松量'. Near neck, bow tie with '领结呼应格裙'. Background: solid light pink, hand-drawn style lines, 5% margin.

Portrait 3:4 vertical. Central card with rounded corners, light lavender gradient. Inside: three small circular thumbnails in a row, each showing a different JK outfit on different models. Below thumbnails, big Chinese text '总花费约615元起' in bold. Bottom of card: a button shape with Chinese text '戳我留言' and heart icon. Background: white with soft shadow, 5% margin.

title: 学生党必看🔥JK制服穿搭指南，清纯又减龄！
body_text:
宝子们！是不是总感觉JK穿搭千篇一律？今天分享几套我亲测的搭配，涵盖甜系、盐系和学院风，日常上学、出街都能穿！每套都是能直接抄作业的。赶紧码住！

✅甜系粉格：短款衬衫+粉色格裙，搭配米色开衫，少女感拉满。裙长约42cm，显腿长。💰衬衫约80元，裙子约120元。
✅盐系蓝格：水手领衬衫+深蓝格裙，搭配黑色领结，清爽又帅气。裙子全棉面料，透气不扎人。💰全套约250元。
✅学院风西装：白衬衫+卡其格裙+灰色西装外套，配红色领带，气质翻倍。西装含羊毛，挺括有型。💰外套约180元。

⚠️购买建议：格裙选TR面料不易皱，衬衫选棉质透气款。第一次买JK建议从基础款开始，搭配领结或领绳提升精致度。

💡搭配技巧：袜子选过膝袜或中筒袜，鞋子选圆头小皮鞋或帆布鞋，整体更日系。发型扎双丸子头或高马尾更减龄！

大家最喜欢哪种风格？评论区告诉我呀😘

pages.title: 甜系粉格
pages.hook: 这套真的太适合约会了！
pages.story: 短款白衬衫搭配浅粉格裙，外搭米色开衫，整体甜而不腻。衬衫领口有刺绣小花，细节满分。裙长42cm，刚好露出膝盖。
pages.layout_hint: 俯拍图，左边摆放衬衫、裙子、开衫，右边真人模特侧身站立在樱花树下，双丸子头，微笑看向镜头。文字标注单品价格

pages.title: 盐系蓝格
pages.hook: 清清爽爽的夏日感
pages.story: 水手领衬衫清爽利落，搭配深蓝格裙，系上黑色领结，简约但很有精神。裙子面料是全棉的，舒适度高，适合日常上课。
pages.layout_hint: 模特在教室走廊自然行走，高马尾，方脸，侧身回头抓拍。右侧标注单品价格和材质标签。背景是窗户和课桌

pages.title: 学院风西装
pages.hook: 穿上就是漫画女主角
pages.story: 白衬衫搭配卡其格裙，外搭灰色西装外套，系红色领带，复古又优雅。西装含羊毛成分，挺括不易皱。裙长42cm，适合155-170cm身高。
pages.layout_hint: 模特在校园图书馆门口，中长发，鹅蛋脸，左手拿书，右手插兜，站立姿势。背景是石柱和绿植。文字标注单品价格和材质

pages.title: 甜美刺绣衫
pages.hook: 细节控狂喜！
pages.story: 白色刺绣衬衫搭配黑色格裙，系红色领绳，精致又乖巧。衬衫前襟有花边刺绣，领口蝴蝶结可拆卸。裙子A字版型，显瘦遮胯。
pages.layout_hint: 模特在咖啡厅坐着，双腿并拢侧放，圆脸，短发，低头看手机。桌上放着一杯咖啡。左侧标注单品细节：刺绣、领绳、裙褶

pages.title: 配饰点睛
pages.hook: 小物提升精致度
pages.story: JK穿搭的灵魂在于配饰：领结、领带、领绳、领花；袜子选纯色或条纹；鞋子选圆头小皮鞋或马丁靴。搭配发饰如蝴蝶结发夹，更有少女感。
pages.layout_hint: 九宫格，9张配饰小图：领结、领带、领绳、发夹、袜子、皮鞋、包袋等，每张带简短名称。中央大文字'配饰清单'

pages.title: 场景搭配
pages.hook: 上学/出游/聚会都合适
pages.story: 日常上课：水手领衬衫+格裙+小皮鞋，清爽方便。周末出游：粉色格裙+开衫+帆布鞋，可爱又舒适。聚会拍照：西装搭配领带，气质出众。
pages.layout_hint: 三列对比图：上学（模特在教室）、出游（模特在公园长椅）、聚会（模特在灯光下）。每列下方标价格。字体手写感

pages.title: 避坑对比
pages.hook: 便宜款vs经典款
pages.story: 便宜格裙褶子易散、面料透光；经典款TR面料垂感好、褶子锋利。衬衫选纯棉或混纺，避免易皱的化纤。领结选硬挺版型，不塌。
pages.layout_hint: 左右对比图：左边便宜裙（褶子散乱），右边经典裙（褶子整齐）。用箭头标注区别。下方文字'建议选经典款'

pages.title: 总结推荐
pages.hook: 最后送上我的心头好
pages.story: 所有搭配中我最推荐'学院风西装'那套，西装版型好，格裙颜色百搭，整体显高显瘦。总花费约400元就能get一套完整穿搭。快艾特你的好姐妹一起穿JK出街吧！
pages.layout_hint: 总结卡片，背景淡粉色，中央大标题'我的TOP1'，下方展示推荐搭配全身图（模特在樱花树下回头笑），旁边标注价格和推荐理由。底部有互动引导文字

cover_prompt: 3:4 portrait, top 20%: bold Chinese title '学生党必看🔥JK制服穿搭指南，清纯又减龄！' in white with drop shadow on soft pink banner. Middle 60%: full-length front view of a Japanese high school girl in classic sailor uniform (white top, navy pleated skirt, red bow tie), standing on cherry blossom path, holding a book, smiling at camera. Bright natural light, pink blossoms blurred. Bottom 20%: scattered petals and decorative cursive Chinese '每日穿搭灵感' at bottom left. Pastel pink and white, 5% margin. Magazine cover style.

image_prompts.prompt: Xiaohongshu poster, vertical 3:4, info-graphic style. Include Chinese text labels, price tags, and titles visible on the image. Showing: 甜系粉格. Clean layout, professional, readable Chinese text.

3:4 portrait, top 10% bright ceiling lights. Middle 70%: Japanese high school girl with high ponytail, square face, walking in classroom corridor, turning head back. She wears white sailor top, navy pleated skirt, black ribbon tie. Background: windows, desks. Right side: vertical Chinese labels '衬衫 约90元', '裙子 约130元', '领结 约30元', material tag '全棉面料'. Natural sunlight, cool blue-white palette. Bottom 20%: tiled floor, shadow. 5% margin.

3:4 portrait, top 15% green leaves and sky. Middle 60%: Japanese high school girl with shoulder-length hair, oval face, standing at library entrance, holding a book in left hand, right hand in pocket. She wears white shirt, khaki pleated skirt, gray school blazer with crest, red striped tie. Background: stone columns, bushes. Right side: Chinese text '衬衫 约80元', '裙子 约120元', '西装 约180元', '领带 约20元', '含羊毛面料'. Warm beige and gray lighting. Bottom 25%: steps, shadow. 5% margin.

3:4 portrait, top 15% warm cafe wall. Middle 60%: Japanese high school girl with short bob, round face, sitting on cafe chair, legs together sideways, looking down at phone. She wears white embroidered blouse, black pleated skirt, red cord tie. On table: coffee cup. Left side: three Chinese detail labels with arrows '刺绣细节', '领绳 约15元', 'A字裙褶'. Soft warm yellow lighting, wooden tones. Bottom 25%: cafe floor, chair legs. 5% margin.

3:4 portrait, light cream background. 3x3 grid of 9 small square images: bow tie (领结), stripe tie (领带), cord tie (领绳), hair clip (发夹), socks (袜子), shoes (皮鞋), bag (包袋), plus two more, each with Chinese name. Center large bold Chinese title '配饰清单' in pink, slightly overlapping. Bottom 20%: Chinese price list '领结 约15-30元', '袜子 约15-20元', '皮鞋 约120-150元'. Rounded corners. 5% margin.

3:4 portrait, top 10% light banner with Chinese subtitle '场景搭配'. Middle 70%: three vertical columns. Left: ponytail girl in classroom with sailor top, skirt, label '上学款 全套约230元'. Middle: pigtail girl in park with pink plaid dress, cardigan, label '出游款 全套约280元'. Right: bun girl in warm light with blazer, tie, label '聚会款 全套约350元'. Each column has pastel color block (light blue, green, pink). Bottom 20%: hand-written Chinese '每天都是JK少女'. 5% margin.

3:4 portrait, top 15% Chinese labels '便宜款' left, '经典款' right. Middle 65%: left side cheap pleated skirt on mannequin, messy pleats, translucent fabric, price tag '约60元 褶子易散'. Right side quality skirt with sharp pleats, good drape, price tag '约120元 TR面料'. Arrows pointing to pleats with Chinese '褶子散乱' and '褶子整齐'. Bottom 20%: large Chinese '建议选经典款', small '更耐穿' next to it. Neutral background, left slightly muted but pastel, right brighter. 5% margin.

3:4 portrait, top 20% light pink gradient, centered large Chinese title '我的TOP1' in gold-coral. Middle 60%: Japanese high school girl with long hair, turning back smiling under cherry tree, wearing gray blazer, khaki skirt, white shirt, red tie. Right side: price tag '总价 约400元', Chinese recommendation '推荐理由：版型好 百搭 显高显瘦'. Bottom 20%: Chinese CTA '快艾特姐妹一起穿JK出街吧！' with pink heart. Soft petals falling. 5% margin.
